goal: Ship provider incident recovery drill evidence without claiming live production recovery performance.
risk: AOF may treat a controlled provider candidate as ready even though the failure path is not reconstructable.
loss_boundary: Do not call v9.5 release-ready unless incident recovery audit, capability delta, product value evidence, and release-state audit are green, and hidden resume authority fails.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the v9.5 incident recovery gate
evidence_plan: schemas, commands, recovery artifact, capability delta, product value evidence, focused tests, release-state audit
stop_conditions: Stop if resume_allowed lacks resume_after_review governance
Stop if not-proven boundary claims live recovery performance
